theme_and_archetype.archetype: Hybrid of Archetype 1 (Trust/Medical) and Archetype 4 (Enterprise SaaS/Swiss High-Contrast)
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Premium medical-tech 3D cinematic style, director-cut smooth, trustworthy, Series A investor-ready

surfaces_and_glassmorphism.dark_header: bg-[#0F2A47] text-white shadow-md border-b border-[#2E5C8A]/50 z-50 relative
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.cinematic_card_default: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.frosted_panel_glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/50 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] rounded-2xl

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid style for Dashboard. Generous gap-6 or gap-8. Direct children must be grid items.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned for dense data and forms. Center-aligned for dramatic hero/upload moments.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade-in with slight Y-axis upward translation (e.g., framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}).
motion_and_interactions.staggered_entrance: For the Verifying Page's 5-agent pipeline, use staggered delays (delay: index * 0.15) for a sequential card lighting effect.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down slightly on click (active:scale-95). Cards lift on hover. Staggered reveal for Dashboard metrics.

NavBar.description: Dark navy header (#0F2A47), Shield logo (lucide-react), premium text links.

UploadPage.description: Drag-drop zone centered in viewport. Cinematic frosted glass background. Modality selector (X-ray, MRI, CT) using Shadcn Select. File validation logic.

VerifyingPage.description: 'Aha' animated agent pipeline. 5 sequential agent cards that light up one by one. Live latency timer counting up.

ResultPages.description: Green/Red/Amber verdict banner. Confidence progress bar. Image preview. For Rejected: Heatmap overlay on image (use absolute positioned red gradient/opacity over the image) and evidence list cards. CTAs forward to reviewer or next scan.

DashboardPage.description: Live metric tiles. Recharts for Verdict Pie, Cost bars, Latency line chart. Audit table at the bottom. Seeded with realistic demo data on mount.

AuditDetailPage.description: Full agent JSON collapsible cards (Shadcn Accordion). Hash chain visualization (prev -> self -> next) showing secure blockchain/audit trail styling.

icons.rules: NO emojis. Use lucide-react exclusively. Logo uses <Shield /> icon.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute based on role. Example: data-testid='upload-submit-button'

demo_xray_1.description: Various MRI images. Use for seeding the upload preview and result page images.

demo_mri_1.description: Close up of a human brain MRI. Use for alternative demo cases.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: lucide-react, framer-motion, recharts.
Set up Tailwind CSS configuration incorporating the custom color palette (#0F2A47, #2E5C8A, #475569, etc.).
Create a layout component that includes the dark Navy Header with Shield icon.
Implement the Upload component with a premium drag-and-drop frosted glass zone.
Implement the Mock Processing/Verifying page using framer-motion to stagger the entrance of 5 agent cards (representing the AI pipeline).
Build the dashboard using Recharts for data visualization and seed realistic demo data in a useEffect so it looks live instantly.
Implement Result pages (Approved, Rejected, Escalated) with appropriate colored banners, confidence bars, and heatmap overlays using absolute positioning for the rejected state.
Ensure ALL interactive elements possess appropriate `data-testid` attributes.
Follow 3D cinematic rules: use backdrop-blur and shadow depth for a premium investor-ready feel.
